title: Add the Codex Spark rapid implementation lane
summary: Add a bounded gpt-5.3-codex-spark rapid implementation role, routing classifier, documentation, validation, and review evidence without changing existing core role assignments or concurrency limits.
acceptance: .codex/agents/rapid-implementer.toml exists and follows the project agent TOML style
The agent workflow Skill contains Spark task classification and routing rules
At most 3 write-heavy tasks may run concurrently
The original 9 role model assignments are not changed without cause
Spark does not own architecture, final review, or high-risk core implementation
Spark tasks must explicitly run tests
Spark unavailable fallback is explicit and auditable
Original handoff ZIP, SHA-256, HANDOFF_MANIFEST.json, and CHECKSUMS.sha256 are unchanged
handoff validator, taskctl validator, taskctl status, and git diff check pass
reviewer gives an independent verified verdict

history.details: WM-0001 already done; taskctl has no standalone promote command
